results.title: Councillors approve €20,000 for Wicklow arts centre lighting despite appeal for double
Colorado Governor Censured for Commuting Sentence of Election Denier (Jack Healy/New York Times)
results.description: Jack Healy / New York Times : Colorado Governor Censured for Commuting Sentence of Election Denier — The Colorado State Democratic Party, reflecting the anger of rank-and-file Democratic voters, rebuked Gov. Jared Polis on Wednesday over his decision to release Tina Peters from prison.

results.title: Pakistan and SA seek stronger ties in changing world order
results.description: South Africa and Pakistan have been urged to deepen cooperation as global instability reshapes trade and international relations.

results.title: AIADMK Split and Vijay’s Rise: How Tamil Nadu Politics Is Entering a Transformative New Era
results.description: The decline of the AIADMK and the rise of chief minister Vijay’s TVK mark a potentially transformative moment in Tamil Nadu politics
